extension.summary: LibTV - Your Kodi Library as Real TV
extension.description: Turn your movies and TV shows into linear channels with full TV guide support. Generates an M3U playlist and XMLTV guide for PVR IPTV Simple Client, with plugin-resolved streams so channels play whatever is currently on air.
extension.news:
v0.7.11: fix the EPG overlay showing no text until the first keypress, and the highlight never appearing on any row. Labels are now always given their text as a constructor argument instead of a later setLabel() call, and the current row is marked with a "> " text prefix instead of a color change (color changes after the first render weren't visibly taking effect).
v0.7.10: fix EPG overlay navigation and shrink the panel — up/down previously drove Kodi's own native channel-preview banner instead of the overlay (a remote/keyboard sends ACTION_CHANNEL_UP/DOWN during PVR playback, not the generic move actions this listened for); onAction now handles both. The panel is now a small strip near the bottom margin with a handful of rows that scroll, instead of nearly the full screen height.
v0.7.9: replace the EPG overlay's ControlList (which rendered nothing at all, even after four fix attempts) with plain ControlLabels and hand-rolled up/down navigation and row highlighting, since a no-skin ControlList's item-rendering path was clearly the problem, not any one parameter.
